Metadata.layoutDescription: Guide for RfC alliance members: create your own Last Z Survival Shooter hero character card with ChatGPT.
Metadata.heroTitle: Hero Character (From Image) — RfC Hero Forge
Metadata.heroDescription: Turn a photo into a Last Z hero card with ChatGPT in four steps.
Metadata.uniqueTitle: Hero Character (Without Image) — RfC Hero Forge
Metadata.uniqueDescription: No photo needed: describe your hero character in text and build the card with ChatGPT.
Metadata.customDescription: Make any kind of hero image — like a group scene — with ChatGPT's help writing the prompt.
Metadata.galleryDescription: Hero character cards created for RFC alliance members.

Footer.worksWith: Works with the ChatGPT app or chatgpt.com

Home.title: Make your own <gold>Last Z</gold> hero card
Home.subtitle: Copy a few reference images, fill in a prompt, paste it all into ChatGPT. Two minutes, no skills needed.
Home.pickPathSub: Three ways to forge an image — each page walks you through it.
Home.pathHeroText: Turn yourself — or anyone — into a hero card with your name on it.
Home.pathUniqueText: No photo needed — describe your hero and ChatGPT invents them.
Home.pathCustomText: Make any kind of hero image you want — group shots, events, themes.
Home.wallSub: Heroes forged by RfC so far. Tap any image to copy it — great as style references.

HeroPage.title: Hero Character (From Image)
HeroPage.intro: Turn a photo into a Last Z hero card with your name on it. You’ll paste 3 images + 1 prompt into ChatGPT — everything you need is on this page.

UniquePage.title: Hero Character (Without Image)
UniquePage.intro: No photo needed — describe a hero and ChatGPT invents them. You’ll paste 3 images + 1 prompt into ChatGPT.

CustomPage.title: Custom Image
CustomPage.intro: Group shots, parties, events — anything. The trick: ChatGPT writes the image prompt for you first, then you run that prompt. Two messages total.

GalleryPage.title: Alliance heroes
GalleryPage.intro: Cards created for RFC members with this workflow. Tap any card to view it full size.

shared.copyBlockedToast: Copy blocked here — press & hold (or right-click) the image to copy/save it
shared.copyFailedToast: Copy failed — select the text and copy manually
shared.scrollHint: Scroll for more → · Copy blocked? Press & hold the image.

hero.doneToast: All set — ChatGPT is forging your hero (1–2 min)
hero.step1Body: Copy + paste a base card into ChatGPT. (Tap a card to copy it.) Rank & colors come in step 4 — any card works.
hero.step2Body: Copy + paste a style example into ChatGPT. (Tap an image to copy it.) It only shows the art style — anyone works.
hero.step3Body: In ChatGPT, attach 1–3 photos of the person or character you’re transforming. Clear, well-lit shots work best.
hero.photoTip: One clear photo is enough — add up to 3 angles for a better likeness. Pets, avatars, and characters work too.
hero.step4Body: Fill in the details, then copy + paste the prompt into ChatGPT and hit send.
hero.howIntro: We give ChatGPT clear instructions + reference images to turn your person/character into a hero character.
hero.howStep2: Provide a hero image (for style accuracy).
hero.howStep3: Provide an image of YOUR person/character (1–3 images).
hero.howStep4: Fill out the prompt details and paste into ChatGPT.
hero.howResult: Result = a hero card in the same style & format as the game’s heroes.
hero.exampleMessage: Use the 3 attached images as references: Image 1 = the base card, Image 2 = the style, Image 3 = the person to transform… <note>(your prompt)</note>
hero.exampleCaption: ChatGPT — your finished hero card (1–2 min)

unique.doneToast: All set — ChatGPT is forging your hero (1–2 min)
unique.step1Body: Copy + paste a base card into ChatGPT. (Tap a card to copy it.) Rank & colors come in step 3 — any card works.
unique.step2Body: Copy + paste 1–2 heroes into ChatGPT, one at a time. (Tap an image to copy it.) The first sets the style, a second adds inspiration — exact picks don’t matter much.
unique.step3Body: Name & describe your hero (plus any card changes), pick a rank, then copy + paste the prompt into ChatGPT and hit send.
unique.detailsPlaceholder: e.g. cute and elegant, blonde hair, tight mythical dress. Change the “B” to “F”, change all blue elements to an earthy green, make her dress out of leaves and branches
unique.howIntro: We give ChatGPT clear instructions + reference images to invent a brand-new hero character — no photo needed.
unique.howStep3: Describe your hero (name, look, card changes) + fill out the prompt, then paste it into ChatGPT.
unique.howResult: Result = an invented hero card in the same style & format as the game’s heroes.
unique.exampleMessage: Use the attached images as references: Image 1 = the base card, Images 2–3 = hero style examples. Invent a new hero from my description… <note>(your prompt)</note>
unique.exampleCaption: ChatGPT — your invented hero card (1–2 min)

custom.doneToast: All set — enjoy your custom image!
custom.step1Body: Say what you want and which attached image is which, then copy your message. A reference prompt is included under your description automatically — it teaches ChatGPT the format.
custom.ideaPlaceholder: e.g. Generate a prompt for adding additional hero characters to the image of SuperT throwing a diamond party. Image 1 is the base image we want to work from; each additional image contains a hero to incorporate. Maintain the same quality and detail.
custom.step2Body: In ChatGPT: attach the base image first, then each hero to include, paste your copied message, and send. ChatGPT replies with a ready-to-run image prompt.
custom.needImages: Need images? Tap any to copy — members’ hero cards work great.
custom.step3Title: Run the prompt ChatGPT gives you
custom.step3Body: Copy ChatGPT’s reply, start a new message, attach the same images again, paste the prompt, and hit send.
custom.tipBody: Not perfect? Just reply with tweaks — e.g. “remove the UI elements and spread the heroes out evenly”.
custom.howIntro: ChatGPT writes the image prompt for you first, then you run that prompt — two messages total.
custom.howStep1: Describe your idea (and which image is which).
custom.howStep2: Attach your images + paste your message → send.
custom.howStep3: ChatGPT replies with a ready-to-run image prompt.
custom.howStep4: New message: same images + that prompt → send.
custom.howStep5: Reply with tweaks until it’s perfect.
custom.howResult: Result = any custom hero image — group shots, parties, events.
custom.exampleMessage: Generate a prompt for adding these heroes to the diamond party. Image 1 is the base; each other image is a hero to include… <note>(your description + reference prompt)</note>
custom.exampleCaption: ChatGPT — your custom image (after running its prompt)

Wall.copyBlockedToast: Copy blocked here — press & hold (or right-click) the image to copy/save it
